events.title: Q4 Kickoff
events.notes: Kick off Q4 strategy session with full team. Review targets and assign ownership.

events.title: New Arrivals Campaign
events.notes: Launch new fall arrivals campaign on TikTok Shop. Focus on boosting GMV with creator-driven content.

events.title: Jelly Roll Boot Launch
events.notes: Official launch of the Jelly Roll collab boot. Coordinate creator seeding and TT Live.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: Monthly sync to review performance, align on priorities, and update the strategy levers.

events.title: TikTok Shop Super Sale
events.notes: TikTok platform-wide super sale event. Increase ad spend and boost creator incentives.

events.title: Slip Camp Release
events.notes: New slip-on camp moc style release. Bundle with sample seeding to key affiliates.

events.title: Creator Review
events.notes: Quarterly review of creator performance. Identify top affiliates for Q4 push.

events.title: Holiday Push
events.notes: Holiday season campaign kickoff. Prep creatives, finalize creator list, set up TT ads.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: November planning sync. Review October performance and confirm holiday campaign readiness.

events.title: Buffalo Plaid Contest
events.notes: UGC contest around the buffalo plaid collection. Incentivize creators with gift cards and increased commission.

events.title: Black Friday Mega Deal
events.notes: Black Friday TikTok Shop mega sale. Maximize ad spend efficiency and push top SKUs.

events.title: Cyber Monday Promo
events.notes: Cyber Monday deals extension. Activate flash coupons and creator live streams.

events.title: Creator Review
events.notes: End-of-year creator audit. Identify top performers and plan retention strategy.

events.title: Holiday Gift Guide Launch
events.notes: Push HEYDUDE as holiday gift option. Coordinate with creators on gift guide content.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: December strategy sync. Final Q4 push review and Q1 2026 planning kickoff.

events.title: 12.12 TikTok Super Sale
events.notes: Annual 12.12 TikTok platform sale event. Double-down on top affiliate deals.

events.title: New Arrivals Campaign
events.notes: Late holiday new arrivals drop. Target gifting audience with fast shipping messaging.

events.title: Winter Clearance Campaign
events.notes: End of season clearance push. Clear excess inventory through TikTok Shop flash deals.

events.title: Year-End Review
events.notes: Full year performance review. Document learnings, celebrate wins, set targets for 2026.

events.title: New Year Teaser Launch
events.notes: Tease new 2026 spring collection via TikTok Live. Seed to select creators for early buzz.

events.title: Q1 2026 Kickoff
events.notes: Kick off Q1 2026. Align on GMV targets, creator rosters, and spring campaign calendar.

events.title: Spring Collection Launch
events.notes: Launch the 2026 Spring Collection. Coordinate influencer seeding and TikTok Shop product listings.

events.title: New Year New Kicks Campaign
events.notes: January campaign targeting resolution shoppers. Focus on fresh starts and lifestyle content.

events.title: TikTok Shop Flash Sale
events.notes: Platform-wide flash sale. Increase CPC bids and activate top affiliate discount codes.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: January recap and February campaign planning. Review early Q1 pacing vs targets.

events.title: Valentine's Day Campaign
events.notes: Valentine's gifting push. Activate lifestyle creators for couples content and gift-guide videos.

events.title: HEYDUDE x Creator Collab Drop
events.notes: Limited-edition collab with top TikTok creator. Exclusive colorway reveal and live selling event.

events.title: Valentine's Flash Promo
events.notes: Valentine's Day TikTok Shop exclusive promo. Push coupon codes and creator live streams.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: February close and March planning. Prep for spring break and St. Patrick's Day moments.

events.title: Spring Break Campaign
events.notes: Spring break lifestyle campaign. Target college-age shoppers with beach and outdoor content.

events.title: St. Patrick's Day Launch
events.notes: Limited green colorway drop for St. Patrick's Day. Flash release via TikTok Live.

events.title: TikTok Shop Deals Week
events.notes: Platform-wide deals week event. Coordinated ad push with category-level promotions.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: March close. Q1 final push review and Q2 planning preview.

events.title: Creator Review
events.notes: Q1 creator performance review. Identify MVPs for Q2 VIP tier. Offboard underperformers.

events.title: Q2 2026 Kickoff
events.notes: Q2 strategy kickoff. Introduce summer campaign themes, set GMV pacing milestones.

events.title: Easter Campaign
events.notes: Easter weekend shopping push. Activate gift-giving content with family lifestyle creators.

events.title: Spring Refresh Launch
events.notes: New pastel colorways drop for spring. Seed to 20 top lifestyle creators ahead of launch day.

events.title: TikTok Spring Sale
events.notes: TikTok Shop spring sale event. Platform coupons plus creator-specific discount codes.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: April mid-month check-in. Review Q2 pacing and adjust creator incentive strategy.

events.title: Apex Q4 Campaign Launch
events.notes: Kick off Q4 Apex Outdoors creator campaign. Coordinate with top 4 live creators for simultaneous launch posts.

events.title: Trailhead Boot Drop
events.notes: New colorway launch for Apex Trailhead Boot. Coordinate with trail_jess and ridgerunner_riley for launch day live streams.

events.title: TikTok Shop Promo - Apex Outdoors
events.notes: Flash sale promotion on TikTok Shop. Ad spend increase approved. 20% off Canyon Sandal and Summit Pack.

events.title: Creator Strategy Sync
events.notes: Internal review of Apex creator performance for October. Identify top performers for November incentive tiers.

events.title: Black Friday Prep - Apex
events.notes: Final creator briefing before Black Friday. Align all 8 creators on key SKUs, promo codes, and content timing.

events.title: Nova Q4 Glow Campaign Launch
events.notes: Kick off Q4 Nova Skincare creator campaign. Coordinate top 3 video creators for simultaneous launch content.

events.title: Nova Hydra Serum Restock Drop
events.notes: New batch of Hydra Serum live on TikTok Shop. glow_with_amy and spf_savannah anchoring launch day videos.

events.title: 11.11 TikTok Shop Promo
events.notes: Major platform sale event. Coordinate video-heavy push — target 60+ posts across all creators.

events.title: Black Friday Live Stream Marathon
events.notes: 8-hour live stream with spf_savannah and glow_with_amy rotating. Finalize product offers and live scripts.

events.title: Pulse Audio Q4 Campaign Kickoff
events.notes: Launch Q4 Pulse Audio creator campaign. beats_and_bass and studio_sam anchoring first-week live content.

events.title: Pulse Bass+ Earbuds Bundle Launch
events.notes: New limited bundle with carrying case. Coordinate with headphone_henry for exclusive unboxing.

events.title: Holiday Gift Guide Push
events.notes: All 7 creators posting gift guide content featuring Pulse audio gear. Coordinate timing for same-day push.

events.title: 11.11 TikTok Shop Promo
events.notes: Platform sale event. Target 40% GMV lift vs prior week. studio_sam hosting 3-hour live.

events.title: Cyber Weekend Live Blitz
events.notes: Coordinated weekend live push across beats_and_bass and studio_sam. Finalize flash deal pricing with Pulse team.
